PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude"\) { Write-Host ".claude directory exists"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude" -Directory | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  DIR: $\($_.Name\)" } } else { Write-Host ".claude directory does not exist" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins"\) { Write-Host "plugins directory exists"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins" -Directory | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  PLUGIN: $\($_.Name\)" } } else { Write-Host "plugins directory does not exist" })

PowerShell(if \(Get-Command "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Host "Git Bash found at: C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe"; bash --version | Select-Object -First 1 } elseif \(Get-Command "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Host "Git Bash found at: C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Git\\bin\\bash.exe" } elseif \(Get-Command "bash" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { Write-Host "bash found on PATH at: $\(Get-Command bash\).Source" } else { Write-Host "WARNING: No bash found. SessionStart hook will not work." })

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== day1 directory ==="; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\Hose\\Desktop\\day1" -Force | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.Name\)" }; Write-Host "`n=== superpowers plugin ==="; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins\\superpowers"\) { Write-Host "Still installed at ~/.claude/plugins/superpowers" } else { Write-Host "NOT found - plugin was deleted" })
PowerShell(try { $word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word.Version; $word.Quit\(\) } catch { Write-Output "Word COM not available" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("C:\\Users\\Hose\\Desktop\\day1\\images.jpg"\); $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($img\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\Users\\Hose\\Desktop\\day1\\images_big.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); Write-Host "Width: $\($img.Width\) Height: $\($img.Height\)"; $img.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); \(Get-Item "C:\\Users\\Hose\\Desktop\\day1\\images_big.png"\).Length)

PowerShell(Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.InterfaceAlias -notmatch 'Loopback' -and $_.IPAddress -notmatch '^169\\.' -and $_.PrefixOrigin -ne 'WellKnown' } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias)

PowerShell(Write-Host "等待 Render 部署..."; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 12; $i++\) { Start-Sleep 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://love-house-8yko.onrender.com/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✅ 第$\($i+1\)次检查: 状态 $\($r.StatusCode\) - 修复成功！"; break } } catch { Write-Host "第$\($i+1\)次: 部署中..." } })

PowerShell(Write-Host "等待部署..."; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 15; $i++\) { Start-Sleep 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://love-house-8yko.onrender.com/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✅ 第$\($i+1\)次: 部署完成，状态200"; break } } catch { Write-Host "第$\($i+1\)次: 部署中..." } })

PowerShell(Write-Host "等待重启..."; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 20; $i++\) { Start-Sleep 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://love-house-8yko.onrender.com/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✅ 在线"; $api = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://love-house-8yko.onrender.com/api/data" -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json"}; Write-Host "API: $\($api.Content\)"; break } } catch { Write-Host "第$\($i+1\)次: 等待中..." } })

PowerShell($body = '{"checkins":{"2026-02-11":true},"dishes":[],"lotteryHistory":[],"stories":[],"profiles":{"wjl":{"name":"王俊龙"},"hyf":{"name":"贺一帆"}}}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://love-house-8yko.onrender.com/api/data" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "保存: $\($r.Content\)"; Start-Sleep 2; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://love-house-8yko.onrender.com/api/data" -UseBasicParsing -Headers @{"Accept"="application/json"}; Write-Host "读取: $\($r2.Content\)")

PowerShell(Write-Host "等待部署..."; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 15; $i++\) { Start-Sleep 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://love-house-8yko.onrender.com/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✅ 已部署 \(第$\($i+1\)次\)"; break } } catch { Write-Host "第$\($i+1\)次: 等待..." } })

PowerShell(Write-Host "等待部署..."; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 15; $i++\) { Start-Sleep 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://love-house-8yko.onrender.com/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Host "✅ 已部署"; break } } catch { Write-Host "等待..." } })
